沉雙子都唔出奇有趣得黎都幾吸引 (自讚) 好玩得但係都好脆弱
不過真係鐘意得會好投入 同時怕得唔到回應 所以態度會好似唔嗲唔吊玩玩下咁 想自己易啲抽離但其實好在意 會忽冷忽熱test對方重視程度
當然 唔鐘意會明顯即刻hea左 態度差左 但唔會拒絕 同雙子傾計好易dead應該就係興趣不大

replies.msg: my friend Jess is a Gemini whereas her boyfriend is a virgo. Her boyfriend is faithful to her and would never cheat on her. Just the other day her boyfriend got into a scuffle with a guy who was hitting on her. The police showed up later and assigned jealousy as the motive for the scuffle. Her brother sometimes takes a nap at lunchtime because he has so much work to do that he sometimes feels drained. He likes to snooze on the sofa or at his desk by the fireplace when everyone else's having lunch outside. He once brought his work along with him to a library where he dozed off at the table. Having a nap especially in front of the fire is a marvelous way to replenish your energy though.

比佢靜左十幾日啦

再靜就真係散
唔知點解
我係女仔我唔會想靜
因為靜下靜下就心淡
